title: Fresh Animations x Programmer Art Continuation Project
description:
This pack is discontinued, I'm sorry for people who were using it. If you want to update it yourself and repost it feel free to, just make sure to get mzov_jen's permission as she's made the PACP textures.

PACP by mzov_jen
Fresh Animations (by FreshLX)
body:
All the textures that don't already come from base Minecraft/Fresh Animations, as well as the background of the pack icon and all the .jem files, are from Programmer Art Continuation Project (PACP), a ressourcepack by mzov_jen: 
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp
(Thanks to her for letting me publish this.)

This ressourcepack aims to make PACP compatible with Fresh Animations, a ressourcepack made by FreshLX:
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations

This ressourcepack ("Fresh Animations x Programmer Art Continuation Project"/"PACPxFreshAnimations") was put together by RamhTheWatermelon.
